title: Innovation Submission Guidelines
description: Step-by-step guide on how to submit innovation ideas, eligibility criteria, and evaluation process.

title: Idea Proposal Template
description: Standardised template for submitting innovation ideas, including all required sections and formatting guidelines.

title: Innovation Policy Framework
description: The official Bank of Uganda policy framework governing innovation management, IP rights, and reward structures.

title: Design Thinking Workshop
description: Training materials from the Design Thinking workshop including exercises, case studies, and facilitator guides.

title: Budget Estimation Tool
description: Excel-based tool for estimating the budget required for innovation projects, with built-in formulas and templates.

title: Innovation Champion Training
description: Comprehensive training programme for Innovation Champions including presentation slides, handouts, and assessment tools.
